LanguageData.CheapSpa.stages.li.description: The bathhouse was well worth the fee.
LanguageData.CheapSpa.stages.li.label: good-value bathhouse
LanguageData.ExpensiveSpa.stages.li.description: I had to pay rather a lot for access to the bathhouse.
LanguageData.ExpensiveSpa.stages.li.label: expensive bathhouse
